Short CV

Gizem Güneş graduated from Hacettepe University, Department of Nursing in 2017. She is continuing her graduate education at Hacettepe University, Institute of Health Sciences, Department of Nursing Fundamentals. She has been working as a Research Assistant at Üsküdar University, Faculty of Health Sciences, Department of Nursing since February 2021.
